items.title: Who is Luigi Mangione, the UnitedHealthcare CEO shooting suspect?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The 26-year-old man charged in last week’s killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO in made an initial appearance Tuesday in a Pennsylvania courtroom. Police arrested Luigi Nicholas Mangione on Monday after he was spotted at a McDonald’s. Read more: https://bit.ly/3BdOSvg 

#luigimangione #news #unitedhealthcare

Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO shooting suspect was carrying handwritten document
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO struggled with deputies and shouted Tuesday while arriving for a court appearance in Pennsylvania, a day after he was arrested at a McDonald’s and charged with murder. (AP Video by Joseph B. Frederick, Ted Shaffrey, Jessie Wardarski). Read more: https://bit.ly/3ZtUUjt 

#news #unitedhealthcare 
Photo credit: Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

items.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO shooting suspect Luigi Mangione leaves courthouse
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Luigi Nicholas Mangione, the suspected killer of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, was escorted by law enforcement from a jail in Hollidaysburg, Pennsylvania. (AP video shot by Ted Shaffrey). Read more: https://bit.ly/3ZtUUjt

items.title: 'We just don't know,' FBI says about the drone sightings in New Jersey
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A senior FBI official told the House Homeland Security Committee Wednesday the recent drone sightings above New Jersey are "concerning," and said the agency is "actively investigating" the situation and trying to determine who is responsible.

#fbi #news #newjersey #drone

items.title: Celebrities and coastal residents flee from wildfire in Malibu
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: Thousands of Southern California residents were under evacuation orders and warnings Tuesday as firefighters battled a wind-driven wildfire in Malibu that burned near celebrities’ seaside mansions, horse farms and Pepperdine University. #shorts #wildfire #extremeweather #weather #California #Malibu

items.title: Defense lawyer says Luigi Mangione wants hearing on extradition issue
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Defense lawyer Thomas Dickey for a person charged in last week's killing of United Healthcare's CEO told the court Mangione wants a hearing on the extradition issue from Pennsylvania to New York. (AP video: Tassanee Vejpongsa). Read more: https://bit.ly/3ZtUUjt

items.title: 2024 Nobel Peace Prize LIVE: Terumi Tanaka accepts award on behalf of Nihon Hidankyo
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Terumi Tanaka accepts the 2024 Nobel Peace Prize in Oslo on behalf of Nihon Hidankyo, an organization of survivors of the Hiroshima and Nagasaki bombings that won this year's prize. 

#nobelpeaceprize #nobelpro #terumitanaka #NihonHidankyo #hiroshima #nagasaki #japan #news #live

items.title: Donald Trump trolls Justin Trudeau and Jill Biden online
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
President-elect Donald Trump’s recent dinner with Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau and his visit to Paris for the reopening of the Notre Dame Cathedral were not just exercises in policy and diplomacy; for Trump, they were also prime trolling opportunities. Read more: https://bit.ly/41uh47Q 

#trump #news #donaldtrump

items.title: Defense lawyer for Luigi Mangione says client is pleading not guilty
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
On Tuesday, defense lawyer Thomas Dickey told the press that his client, Luigi Mangione, is not guilty for any criminal charges in last week's killing of United Healthcare's CEO. (AP video shot by Mark Scolforo).

#news

items.title: Biden touts his economic record, urges Trump to 'build on this progress'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
President Joe Biden delivered a speech Tuesday defending his economic legacy while challenging Donald Trump to "build on" the progress and preserve some of Biden's policy ideas upon the Republican's return to the White House in January.

items.title: Satellite Art Show presents itself as alternative to Art Basel Miami
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The artist-run Satellite Art Show in Miami Beach presents itself as an edgier alternative to the annual Art Basel Miami, featuring provocative and experimental art installations, interactive exhibits, performances and video art. (AP video: Daniel Kozin).

items.title: Vandals burn a car and spray graffiti in antisemitic attack in Australia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A car was torched and houses were graffitied with anti-Israel slogans in Sydney on Wednesday after federal police established a task force to investigate increasing incidents of antisemitic crime across Australia. Read more: https://bit.ly/4g6QFBb 

#australia #sydney #news

items.title: Athletes say Biathlon officials ignored sexual harassment, abuse for decades
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Sexual abuse and harassment by coaches and others who held positions of power over women on the U.S. Biathlon team were ignored or excused over decades by officials more concerned with winning medals, according to Olympians and other biathletes interviewed by The Associated Press. (AP Video by Martha Bellisle, Jenny Kane, Manuel Valdes)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: The search continues for thousands of Palestinians who have gone missing in Gaza
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Reem Ajour says she last saw her husband and then 4-year-old daughter in March, when Israeli soldiers raided a family home in northern Gaza. She is haunted by those chaotic last moments, when the soldiers ordered her to go – to leave behind Talal and Masaa, both wounded. Their cases — a fraction of the thousands who have gone missing during the 14-month-long war. (AP Video shot by Abed Al-Kareem Hana and Mohammad Jahjouh/Production by Wafaa Shurafa)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​
